label: Light Meter
items: New 'where this reading sits' band shows where your lux measurement falls on the deep-shade-to-full-sun gradient.
When you pick an area, see at a glance whether each plant in it is over- or under-lit — green ✓ for within range, amber for under, rose for over.

label: Microclimate Report
items: Export the Microclimate Report to PDF — tap the printer icon to print or save through your browser's print dialog.

label: AI Insight
items: The AI Insight card now appears in the Planner ('Your plans') and the Shed ('Your shed') as well as the dashboard, so insights catch you wherever you're working.

label: Guides
items: Bookmark any guide with the star — bookmarked guides are pinned to the top of your Guides list and stay in sync across your devices.
